programmes.show_description: Friday is Golfer's Day, so OJ wants you to create the best celebrity golf puns. From clubs to attire, bunkers to greens, see if yours can make the Punderland XI team.

programmes.show_description: OJ's replaying part of his chat with Leanne Brown from Sweet Female Attitude, as it's 26 years this month since Flowers reached number 2 in the UK. Plus, even more tracks from 2000.
